text: Audio Waveform — because uploading 5GB to a server felt like dial-up energy.
Drop a video file. Any size. We don't judge. Up to 5GB.
Stored in IndexedDB. 50MB chunks. Your browser is now a database.
Audio extracted in seconds. Stream copy — no re-encoding. Just vibes.
Downsampled to 8kHz mono. 57 million samples. Math is beautiful.
Peaks extracted. One min/max pair per pixel. Pixel-perfect accuracy.
Waveform rendered. Blue is quiet. Red means someone's yelling.
Click to seek. The cursor follows. Auto-scroll keeps up.
Zoom in. Zoom out. Find that bass drop.
Zero server processing. Your files never leave your machine. Privacy by architecture.
Audio Waveform. 885 lines of vanilla JS. No framework. No excuses.
